#  Create an RFI (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.
    * Duplicate RFI numbers are NOT permitted.
    * To learn about automated email notifications, see [When does the RFIs tool send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-the-rfis-tool-send-email-notifications)
    * You can configure what items are created with the **quick create**![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon, see [Configure Quick Create Settings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-ios/tutorials/configure-quick-create-settings-ios).


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device and select a project.
  2. Tap the **RFIs** tool and tap the **create**![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.
  3. Tap to enter information into the appropriate fields. 
  4. Tap **Create**.


## See Also
  * [Create a Change Event from an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-an-rfi-ios)
  * [Respond to an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/respond-to-an-rfi-ios)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-ios)
title: Create an RFI (iOS)
description: How to create an RFI from an iOS mobile device.
